3169570.name: Travel Agency Simulator
3169570.description:
Travel Agency Simulator lets you step into the shoes of a travel agency owner, tasked with transforming a small, struggling business into a world-renowned empire. Design custom travel packages, manage client relationships, and grow your office from the ground up. Navigate the challenges of the travel industry, from securing international partnerships to handling VIP clients, all while expanding your business and reputation. With dynamic systems like a day-night cycle, weather and seasonal events, every decision counts as you build the ultimate travel agency. Rebuild the legacy and create unforgettable journeys!

Managing Clients

Keep your travelers happy (and your reputation spotless)! In Travel Agency Simulator, every client has their dream vacation, it’s your job to make it happen. Book flights, plan hotels, and send them off smiling (hopefully). A satisfied traveler means a thriving business… and fewer angry phone calls before lunch.


Decorating the Office

Your office is more than a workplace, it’s your kingdom of coffee cups and brochures. Rearrange furniture, add stylish décor, and turn your agency into the coziest hub in town. A beautiful office inspires creativity… or at least distracts from the paperwork mountain piling up on your desk.

Day & Night Cycle

From sunrise meetings to late-night planning sessions, time moves naturally in Travel Agency Simulator. Open up in the morning, greet your clients, and wrap up when the moon rises (just don’t forget to actually go home, we can’t manage your sleep schedule too).
3169570.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
